release_notes: Three fixes for v1.8.0 feedback. (1) Transcription accuracy: removed the temperature=0 pin on Whisper which was disabling its temperature-fallback retry chain — Whisper was emitting nothing on hard segments instead of retrying, causing lines like 'would you be open to listing?' to go missing. Also trimmed WHISPER_VOCAB to stop biasing toward email patterns, and made the hallucination filter segment-level so it no longer mutilates real speech via substring-replace. (2) Temperature logic: scoring prompt now ALWAYS returns a concrete Hot/Warm/Cold/Nurture/Throwaway based on available info instead of refusing when MV is unknown. New 'temp_is_preliminary' flag. Zestimate/MV field now accepts 'N/A' or 'None' — locks in the preliminary temp as final without recalculation. (3) In-app audio player in the Transcript tab: play/pause + seekable progress bar. Listen while reading, using Windows MCI (no new dependency).
